rows.label: tev900291_MSG0010
rows.name:
Hi, you! Just the person
I was hoping to see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0020
rows.name:
Actually, I've been looking at data
salvaged from the Life Point for
my research on Earth culture.

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0030
rows.name:
Among that data, the thing
called a "novel" is personally
very interesting to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0040
rows.name:
Making fictional stories into
entertainment, isn't that
incredibly creative and wonderful?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0050
rows.name:
So, I'd like to try reading
one, but there's even more
data than I expected......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0060
rows.name:
Apparently, they define categories using
something called "genre." Which genre do you
think would be good for me to start with?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_JNK0070
rows.name: Sci-Fi

rows.label: tev900291_SEL0080
rows.name: Recommend a Sci-Fi novel.

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0090
rows.name:
Sci-Fi novel...hmm.
According to the data[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0100
rows.name:
Literary works depicting themes like advanced science
and technology, space travel, and extraterrestrial
life, falling into a relatively complex category[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0110
rows.name: Hmm... I see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0120
rows.name:
...Huh? Wait a second.
If I think about it[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0130
rows.name:
That doesn't sound very original
at all! Wouldn't that fall under
contemporary writing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0140
rows.name:
W-Well, maybe this is a good chance to
learn about humans' view of the universe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_JNK0150
rows.name: Mystery Novel

rows.label: tev900291_SEL0160
rows.name: Recommend a Mystery novel.

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0170
rows.name:
Mystery novel... hmm.
According to the data[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0180
rows.name:
Literary works centered on deducing the identity
of a human who committed a crime like murder or
robbery by investigating the remaining clues[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0190
rows.name: ...I see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0200
rows.name:
In other words, this is a story
themed around the philosophical
concept of what constitutes sin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0210
rows.name:
The concept of sin varies greatly depending
on the customs of each civilization... Yes.
This seems like it could be informative.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_JNK0220
rows.name: Novels for Young People

rows.label: tev900291_SEL0230
rows.name: Recommend novels for young people.

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0240
rows.name: Hmm? Let's see... According to the data[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0250
rows.name:
After death, reincarnated into another universe,
eliminating all enemies with power granted by God,
a grand epic about building paradise in that world[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0260
rows.name:
...Huh? Reincarnated into another
universe...? Um, what does that mean?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0270
rows.name:
And power granted by God...? The
God that humans worship, does it
really grant power so generously?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0280
rows.name:
Wh-What an amazing concept... It seems
incredibly difficult for me to grasp,
but this is human sensibility...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev900291_MSG0290
rows.name:
In any case, thank you. I'll take
your opinion into consideration.[ST:wait ]
